symptoms: Multiple trains reporting brake system warnings on Blue Line
context: Morning rush hour, dry weather conditions, no recent maintenance
expected_diagnosis: Likely wheel slip conditions due to rail contamination. Recommend speed restrictions and rail cleaning.

symptoms: Intermittent signal failures across entire Northern section
context: Heavy rainfall in past 24 hours, aging signal infrastructure
expected_diagnosis: Water ingress in signal equipment causing intermittent failures. Requires immediate inspection and weather protection.
